maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.description: Filter by court type. F=Federal/SCOTUS, FD=Federal District, FB=Federal Bankruptcy, F=Federal Appellate, FBP=Federal Bankruptcy Panel, FS=Federal Special.
jurisdiction.sectionDescription: Pulls from the Court Listener public API which mirrors the federal court directory.

inUseOnly.title: Active courts only
inUseOnly.description: When enabled, only returns courts marked as currently in use.

courtName.title: Court name filter (optional)
courtName.description: Case-insensitive substring match on full court name.
